3204630.name: Tellus: Echo of the Void Demo
3204630.description:
This is the demo of Tellus: Echo of the Void is a captivating sci-fi adventure, survival and discovery currently on development.

Delve into breathtaking environments ranging from barren deserts to crystalline caves, all while facing the challenges of extreme weather, limited resources, and looming celestial threats. Build your own base. Every decision you make shapes the planet's transformation, unlocking new technologies, biomes, and secrets buried deep within Tellus.

Features of the demo:

  • Terraform the Planet: Build, craft, and innovate to breathe life into Tellus' hostile terrain. As demo goes, you can reach level 2 terraform. That means, you will be able to see clear skies. And thus, explore more easily the enviroment.

  • Dynamic Exploration: Discover unique Points of Interest, ancient structures, and alien artifacts. As demo goes, you can find a couple of points of interest with some technology can help to craft new machines and equipment.

  • Technology: You can craft Tier 1 machines and equipment. That will allow to create your own base, and machines that can terraform the planet up level 2. Also equipment like bigger inventory and mining laser so you will not need to pick metal resources by hand!

  • Cosmic Challenges: Survive meteor showers, solar flares, and other celestial dangers. In the demo you will be able to face meteor showers. Those are menacing, but also provide resources!

Are you ready to leave your mark on Tellus? The echo of the void awaits. Chew a bit of what is to come!

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
